design_philosophy: Serious engineering-grade dashboard styling with CAD-like precision. Dark blueprint-inspired theme for high contrast between energized and idle electrical components.

layout_and_spacing.structure: flex h-screen w-full bg-[#0B132B] overflow-hidden dir-rtl
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-72 flex-shrink-0 bg-[#111A31] border-l border-[#3A506B] p-4 flex flex-col gap-4 z-10 overflow-y-auto
layout_and_spacing.topbar: absolute top-4 left-4 right-72 flex justify-between items-center px-6 py-3 bg-[#111A31]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#3A506B] rounded-lg z-20 pointer-events-auto
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-2, p-4, gap-4, p-6, etc.)

sidebar_draggable_item.classes: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-[#1C2541] rounded-md border border-[#3A506B] cursor-grab hover:border-[#00B4D8] hover:bg-[#1C2541]/80 transition-colors shadow-sm select-none

workspace_grid.instructions: Use Konva.js to draw a background grid. Grid lines should be 1px solid #3A506B at 30% opacity, spaced 20px apart. Add thicker lines (50% opacity) every 5th line (100px) for a true CAD blueprint feel.

buttons.run: px-4 py-2 bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] border border-[#10B981]/30 rounded hover:bg-[#10B981]/20 hover:border-[#10B981] transition-all font-bold flex items-center gap-2
buttons.stop: px-4 py-2 bg-[#EF4444]/10 text-[#EF4444] border border-[#EF4444]/30 rounded hover:bg-[#EF4444]/20 hover:border-[#EF4444] transition-all font-bold flex items-center gap-2
buttons.icon_button: p-2 text-[#8D99AE] hover:text-[#00B4D8] hover:bg-[#3A506B]/30 rounded transition-colors

modals.content: fixed top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-[#111A31] border border-[#3A506B] p-6 rounded-lg shadow-2xl w-[400px] z-50 flex flex-col gap-6
modals.input: w-full bg-[#1C2541] border border-[#3A506B] text-[#FFFFFF] px-3 py-2 rounded focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00B4D8] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00B4D8]

interactions_and_motion.drag_drop: Cursor becomes grabbing. Item becomes semi-transparent while dragging. Snap to grid when dropped on canvas.
interactions_and_motion.wiring: Click first terminal -> draw dashed line to cursor -> click second terminal to finalize. Valid connection highlights terminal node in blue, invalid in red.

animations.buzzer: When energized, apply a rapid subtle x-axis shake animation to the Konva group and display sound wave arcs radiating outward.
animations.contactor: Visual switch closing animation (line moving) or color state change when coil (A1/A2) is energized.
animations.wires: Energized wires glow with drop-shadow effect in Konva (shadowBlur, shadowColor) or marching ants effect (lineDashOffset animation in Konva loop).

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes. Example: data-testid='run-simulation-btn', data-testid='drag-item-timer', data-testid='settings-modal-input-ip'.
accessibility_and_testing.rtl_considerations: UI is RTL. Sidebar on left, canvas on right. Ensure the container has dir='rtl'. Use standard logical properties where available.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the project layout as an RTL dashboard using dir='rtl' on the root container. The sidebar must stay on the left as requested.
2. Use the 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic' font for all text. Ensure it is imported via Fontsource or Google Fonts in index.css.
3. Use Konva.js (or react-konva) for the central CAD workspace. Implement a grid background using Konva.Line elements to simulate a blueprint.
4. For the sidebar draggable elements, implement HTML5 drag API. On drop over the Konva stage, get pointer position and spawn the respective Konva Component Group.
5. Implement node-to-node wiring logic: clicking a terminal starts drawing a wire. Clicking another terminal connects them. Maintain a graph structure in state.
6. During 'Run' (تشغيل المحاكاة), evaluate the electrical graph starting from power supplies to determine energized nodes. Update state and visually glow energized wires/terminals.
7. Implement Shadcn UI Dialogs for the Timer Relay settings (المؤقت الزمني) and Wi-Fi relay IP (إعدادات الواي فاي) when a user double-clicks the components.
8. Perform fetch requests to the configured Wi-Fi relay IP when specific virtual contactors are closed.
9. Use the defined dark technical color palette accurately to ensure a serious engineering tool feel.
10. Add `data-testid` to all crucial elements for testing automation.
